calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-10-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquest, Clerk Carla Contreras, Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff, Josette Indart, is present.
Attorney, Daniel Bornstein, is appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant,Catie A. Okorie, is present.
Attorney, Jill Rowe, is present representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located at 750 Bacon Street #2, San Francisco, CA 94122

The trial date of October 14, 2008 is vacated.
